## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) with a component scope (e.g., `feat(cli): ...`)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` (or the relevant per-publisher changelog) updated
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or private files committed
- [ ] User-facing changes come with docs updates
